comments.text: Ridiculous to use a pic from Norway as a Thumbnail

comments.author: @WorldDiscovered_Official
comments.text: Iceland truly feels like a place where the Earth is still alive and unfinished. The contrast between fire and ice — volcanoes, glaciers, waterfalls, black lava fields, and endless open landscapes — makes it one of the most unique places in the world. This documentary captures that raw and mysterious beauty so well. Every scene feels powerful, quiet, and almost unreal.

replies.author: @TraceTheGlobe
replies.text: We really appreciate your perspective 🌌 It’s amazing how Iceland feels untouched and alive at the same time. We’re happy the video could capture that quiet yet powerful atmosphere 🙏
